seo.title: Chinese New Year 2027 农历新年 — Grand Pavilion 大观楼
seo.description: Celebrate Lunar New Year 2027 with our special prix-fixe banquet dinner. Limited tables — reserve early at Grand Pavilion, Flushing NY.

festival.name: Chinese New Year
festival.tagline: Usher in the Year of the Goat with a Feast of Tradition
festival.taglineZh: 以传统盛宴迎接羊年新春
festival.description: Chinese New Year is the most important celebration in our calendar — and Grand Pavilion's most anticipated event. Each year, our kitchen prepares an elaborate prix-fixe menu of auspicious Cantonese dishes, each selected for its symbolic meaning and flavors that are said to bring fortune, health, and happiness in the coming year.
festival.descriptionZh: 农历新年是我们最重要的节日，也是大观楼全年最受期待的盛事。每年，我们的厨房团队都会精心制作一套寓意吉祥的粤菜年夜饭，每道菜肴都经过精心挑选，象征福气、健康与来年好运。
festival.urgencyMessage: Only 24 tables remaining for Feb 1 sitting

courses.description: A celebratory braise symbolizing prosperity and abundance
Symbolizes abundance — served whole with ginger and scallion
Wok-fried rice with egg, XO sauce, and dried scallop
Hand-pulled noodles in superior broth — represent long life
Pan-fried sticky rice cake — symbolizes rising fortune year by year
6-hour braised South African abalone — the highest status dish of the lunar banquet
Long-simmered premium soup with fish maw and dried scallop
Market-fresh live lobster with garlic vermicelli
Served with house soy and fresh ginger
New Year cake, glutinous rice balls, and seasonal sweet soups
